# Version 3.119.3
> **Rolled up into 3.119.4** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.3-preview)

> **Superseded by [3.119.4](3.119.4.md)** · Never released as stable — these changes rolled up into 3.119.4.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.3/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.4/index.md)

## Highlights

Preview 3.119.3 collected native-dependency refreshes and AoT fixes that shipped as 3.119.4.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **AoT crash with reflection disabled** — Fixes a startup crash when consumers publish with IlcDisableReflection=true. ([#3485](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3485))
- **Linux ARM64 fontconfig** — Adds fontconfig runtime library to the cross-compile sysroot so Linux ARM64 no longer crashes at first font use. ([#3494](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3494))

## Security

- **Spectre mitigation on native binaries** — Enables the /Qspectre-style flag on the bundled Windows and Linux native libraries. — ❤️ [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) ([#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496), [#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502))
- **Native dependency refresh** — Updates libpng, libwebp, brotli and libexpat in the bundled Skia. ([#3452](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3452), [#3478](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3478), [#3469](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3469), [#3458](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3458), [#3463](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3463))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.4

No HarfBuzzSharp binding changes shipped in this release — it rebuilds the same HarfBuzz as the previous line.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) | Spectre-mitigation build flags for the Windows and Linux native binaries. ([#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496), [#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502)) |

## Preview 1 (February 7, 2026)

Preview 1 cut the 3.119.3 line with the AoT crash fix, the Linux ARM64 fontconfig fix, and refreshed native dependencies.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2...v3.119.3-preview.1.1)
